error_signature: The resource you are requesting could not be found
title: Gemini model not found error
symptom: The Gemini Ask Question node throws an error stating that the requested resource could not be found, indicating the model is either unsupported or decommissioned.
not_this_if: Using a different node or API
root_cause: The error occurs because the specified model version has reached its end of cycle and is no longer available for use. This can happen if the model has been decommissioned or if the API version does not support the requested model.
fix_steps: Check the list of available models using the ListModels API call
Select a currently supported model version, such as gemini-2.5 or higher
Update the node configuration with the new model version
Save the workflow and test again
agent_instruction: Update the Gemini model in the node to a currently supported version like gemini-2.5 or higher.
